item.name: Sharknose Goby
item.description:
Some speculate that this small saltwater fish may have migrated to the cenote from the sea.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The blue stripes on its back and golden tinge of its cranial scales serve to further highlight its decidedly sharklike snout.
